title: Session preamble gains a Project map section (pointers or warning)
action: In buildSessionPreamble (inject.mjs), after the Standard commands section and before the Critical patterns digest, add a Project map section (per D5), hard cap 2-4 lines total including the heading: when docs/specs/system-overview.md or docs/specs/reading-map.md exists, emit pointer line(s) for the one(s) that exist plus a specced-area count (count of docs/specs/*.md excluding system-overview.md and reading-map.md; mention visuals/ never); when BOTH are missing, emit exactly one warning line naming the fix: project map missing (Q1/Q2 unanswerable from repo) - bee-scribing bootstrap available. Layout pinned: the ### Project map heading is ALWAYS present (warning line sits under it); the specced-area count is its own line; the blank separator line before the heading does not count against the 2-4 line cap; when docs/specs/ has area specs but neither map file, the warning still fires (maps are the Q1/Q2 artifacts, area specs alone do not answer them). Follow the existing section style (### heading + dash lines). Do NOT add PBI counts (that is slice 4, D10). Extend templates/tests/test_lib.mjs: preamble shows both pointers + count when both files exist; shows single pointer when only one exists; shows the single warning line when neither exists; section never exceeds 4 lines.

truths: Preamble with both map files present carries their paths and the specced-area count within 4 lines
Preamble with neither map file carries exactly one warning line naming bee-scribing bootstrap

artifacts.substantive: Project map section in buildSessionPreamble, no TODO stubs

key_links: section reads the same repo root the commands section uses - no new path plumbing
prohibitions: No content beyond pointers/count/warning - never inline spec content into the preamble (token budget, D5)
No changes to buildPromptReminder or the inject cache logic

trace.outcome: buildSessionPreamble gains a Project map section (D5): heading always present; pointer lines for existing system-overview.md/reading-map.md plus a specced-area count line, or exactly one warning line naming bee-scribing bootstrap when both maps are missing (area specs alone do not suppress it); 2-4 lines including heading; no PBI content. Four self-cleaning fixture tests added to test_lib.mjs.
